# Project Name

> A brief description of what this project does and who it's for.

This repository follows a standardized template structure for GitHub projects, including mandatory task management and configuration files to streamline development workflows.

## Documentation

- [Main README](README.md): Primary project documentation, technology stack, and setup instructions
- [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md): Guidelines for contributing to the project
- [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md): Community guidelines and expectations
- [Security Policy](SECURITY.md): Instructions for reporting security vulnerabilities

## Task Management

- [Project Tasks](tasks/todo.md): Actionable task tracking, milestones, and review notes
- [Lessons Learned](tasks/lessons.md): Patterns and lessons accumulated over the project lifecycle

## Configuration

- [Environment Variables](.env): Private API keys and secrets (not tracked by version control)
- [Humans Metadata](humans.txt): Author details, repository metadata, and technology stack information
- [Repository Metadata](.github/repository-metadata.json): Standard JSON structure for automated repository tracking
- [Funding Configuration](.github/FUNDING.yml): GitHub sponsors and funding details
